metadata.title: Make pm-starter the canonical full ExtensionApi reference
metadata.description: Rewrite index.ts to demonstrate EVERY ExtensionApi capability with safe, commented DEMO examples; add capability matrix to README; full mock in tests; verify with doctor (0 collisions).
metadata.author: codex
metadata.close_reason: All 9 capabilities demonstrated; output-corruption defects fixed; verified green.

metadata.title: ci: fix release workflow step ordering
metadata.description: Swap changelog regeneration before release:check so changelog:check sees the version-bumped CHANGELOG.md instead of failing the gate.
metadata.author: codex
metadata.close_reason: Swapped changelog generation before release checks so changelog:check sees updated file. Verified workflow dispatch then triggers npm publish + GH release.

metadata.title: Release readiness hardening for pm-starter
metadata.description: Prepare pm-starter as a production-ready pm package with package-local pm tracking, generated changelog data, CI and daily release automation.
metadata.author: codex
metadata.acceptance_criteria: Package installs with pm install; npm release gate passes; changelog is generated from package-local pm data; tracked files and reachable git history have no secret pattern hits.

metadata.title: Add publish retry + provenance fallback to release workflow
metadata.description: Replace the npm publish step in .github/workflows/release.yml with a resilient version that (1) skips if the version is already published, (2) retries up to 3 times with 30s sleep, and (3) falls back to publishing without --provenance after persistent registry 404s. Permanent fix for the 2026-05-27 npm E404 outage that left all 19 packages tagged in git but unpublished on npm.
metadata.author: codex

metadata.title: Add bun-install verification to release workflow
metadata.description: Smoke-test that the just-published npm package installs cleanly via bun via daily release workflow.
metadata.author: codex

metadata.title: Fix README to document all 9 capabilities accurately + strengthen smoke test
metadata.description: README claimed 8 capability types and listed stale command/hook/renderer names; reconcile to the 9 capabilities the manifest+index.ts already demonstrate (commands, renderers, hooks, schema, importers, search, parser, preflight, services) with correct registered names (importer/exporter command paths starter-demo, search provider starter-substring, vector store starter-memory, the five api.hooks.* hook names). Fix manifest description 8->9. Strengthen smoke test to assert every register*/hook fires.
metadata.author: codex
metadata.close_reason: README/manifest/test fixes complete; build+typecheck+test green; functional activation proven in scratch workspace
